working_on.feature: Dynamic Month Configuration, Overtime Bonus & Penalty
working_on.task: Added month-based configuration, 9-hour overtime bonus for 0 days off, Penalty input with notes, and month-switch auto-save
working_on.notes: Enabled dynamic monthly config overrides for specific employees. Standardized overtime rewards and penalty structures. Enabled auto-saving to backend on month switches.

recent_changes.description: Adjusted default application month to start at currentMonth - 1 (previous month)
Implemented auto-save on month change to prevent data loss
Added dynamic employee configuration based on queried month (specifically for Hoa's changes in 2026-06)
Automatically reward 9 hours of overtime when days_off is 0
Added Phạt (penalty amount and note) input and display throughout results, summary and slips

errors_encountered.error: Chrome download attribute ignored for data URLs resulting in UUID filenames
errors_encountered.solution: Created a Flask API endpoint `/api/export-image` to save base64 directly to the user's Desktop

errors_encountered.error: XSS injection via employee name field
errors_encountered.solution: Added `sanitize_text` and `sanitize_id` in `app.py` and converted innerHTML to textContent/createElement in JS

errors_encountered.error: OCR reading 'St mặt hàng' instead of 'SL'
errors_encountered.solution: Relaxed the regex in JS to fuzzy match the 'mặt hàng' keyword

decisions_made.decision: Save images directly to Desktop via Flask
decisions_made.reason: Bypass browser restrictions on downloading Data URIs with custom filenames
Prevent data loss on accidental F5, but clear on Ctrl+F5

decisions_made.decision: Auto-save to backend when switching months
decisions_made.reason: Avoid local draft override and prevent data loss when checking other months
